_notes: Goblet Squat · 40kg · 2 issues (moderate + low) · Hold recommendation.

coaching.summary_paragraph: At 40kg your squat shows decent depth but your left knee is consistently caving inward from rep 2 onwards. This pattern has appeared before at this weight — address the movement fault before adding more load.

posture.correction: Keep your chest tall throughout the descent — brace your core before each rep and think about pulling your elbows down toward your hips.

stability.correction: Push your left knee outward in line with your pinky toe as you drive up — focus on this cue on every rep.

movement_quality.correction: Slow your descent to a 3-count — you are rushing the bottom of the squat which is reducing your control and depth.

tempo.correction: Try a 3-1-2 tempo — 3 seconds down, 1 second pause at the bottom, 2 seconds up. Your reps are getting faster as fatigue sets in.

progression.reasoning: Knee valgus present in 4 of 5 reps and worsening across sessions at this weight. Hold at 40kg and address hip abductor activation before progressing.
